---
title: Pitambar's paper on heteroatom-doped carbons from ionic liquid precursors in Carbon
date: 2026-01-03
categories: [Publication]
---

Congratulations to Pitambar Poudel on his <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.carbon.2025.121186" target="_blank">paper</a> in Carbon on the synthesis and characterisation of heteroatom-doped carbon materials derived from ionic liquid precursors. The study explores how ionic liquid chemistry can be exploited to engineer carbon materials with well-defined heteroatom content and electrochemically favourable surface properties. A collaborative effort with Rana Yunis, Owen Curnow, and Alison Masters. Well done Pitambar!
